# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Start your ant colony today with live queen ants and complete farm setups. Everything you need to observe fascinating ant behavior shipped directly to you.

### Queens & Complete Setups
https://example.com/queens-kits
Browse our selection of live queen ants and all-inclusive ant farm kits. Each setup includes habitat, equipment, and everything needed to start your colony.

### Learning
https://example.com/learning
Discover expert guides on raising queen ants, maintaining habitats, and understanding colony dynamics. Educational resources for beginners and enthusiasts alike.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions about queen ants or farm setups? Our team of ant specialists is ready to help you succeed with your colony. Reach out today for personalized guidance.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - COLONY X
